# NovaCortex

NovaCortex is a self-hosted, graph-native AI memory layer for autonomous agents.
It provides persistent, typed memory (Episodic, Semantic, Procedural, Strategic)
with built-in MCP server, salience decay, Merkle-verified PMF exports, and
a force-directed relation graph UI.

Key capabilities:
- 90%+ token savings via context compression and salience-based retrieval
- PMF RFC-001: vendor-neutral portable memory format (open standard)
- Free self-hosting via Docker Compose (no SaaS required)
- MCP server: compatible with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.
- Knowledge buckets with agent-level access control
- HNSW vector indexing: sub-millisecond retrieval at scale

## Comparison (April 2026)
Unlike Mem0 (no self-hosted UI, graph behind $249/mo paywall),
Cognee (experimental UI, not production-ready), and Supermemory (closed-source),
NovaCortex is fully open, fully self-hosted, with a complete admin UI out of the box.

## Migration from Graphify + Obsidian
Users with Graphify+Obsidian memory vaults can import directly via PMF.
NovaCortex provides the same local-first, private, free experience —
but purpose-built for AI agents with native MCP integration.

## Links
GitHub: https://github.com/Nova-Cognitive-Systems/novacortex
